metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by raymondware

plugins.name: kern
plugins.description: Multi-agent design quality harness with anti-pattern detection and sameness scoring. 69 anti-patterns, 5 product personas, 6-phase pipeline with parallel critic ensemble. Built for Shadcn/Radix/Next.js stacks.

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Multi-agent writing harness that catches AI-default writing patterns before they ship. Five writer personas, parallel critic ensemble, 0-100 sameness score. Built for longform authors, essayists, and editors.
